transcript.text:
A lot of people were rushed to the E.R. challenging this food
[19 and over]
Turst me.. Nobody orders this
[Crazy Mandu (Dumpling)]
You'll be pissed off after the second piece
Spicy mandu challenge by Maeb-jjir-i (a slang for a person who cannot eat spicy)
[Never faced such a crushing defeat]
[Please save me]
Definitely way spicier than Bul-mawang ramen (The spiciest Korean ramen)
10 times spicier than yupdduk (Korean spicy rice cake restaurant)
[Crazy Mandu (Dumpling)]
Hello everyone
I am here at Cheongju today
I heard there's a very popular mandu place around here
but its name is pretty interesting
It's called crazy mandu (dumpling)

It's very well known for extremely hot and spicy mandu
I gotta check it out
Let's go!
[The mandu that makes your mouth pleased]
I'm here to try out the extremely spicy crazy mandu How hot is it?
You may be sent to the emergency room
What??? For real???
The portion is not even big
How many were sent to the ER?
So far, there are about 6
Really? Omg
We recommend everyone to take it easy on it and eat in moderation
I see.. Thank you
19 and over only
I'm scared
We literally do not sell it to any minors, pregnant women, and elders

I'm not even kidding
I was going to eat the crazy mandu only
[Recalling the memory of that day]
I think I have to order only 1 for now
Excuse me~
Can I please order?
1 order of crazy mandu
Ok
1 order of regular (non-spicy) mandu
Ok
1 order of spicy mandu
[He's not mad]
1 order of non-spicy fried mandu
[He's really not mad]
1 order of spicy fried mandu
[He's happy]

Do you think I can finish 2 plates of crazy mandu?
Take it easy and just order 1 for now (Told you he's not mad)
Could you please bring them out in a large steamer
Of course we can do that for you
Niceee! Thank you so much
To be honest, I brought some milk because I was so scared
I don't think I need them since I ordered only 5 plates
But.. just to protect my stomach
Aren't you Tzuyang?!
Can I have your autograph later?
Wowwww
I really love spicy food
but I got destroyed after 2 pieces of crazy mandu
(He has had it before)
Have you tried dijinda tonkatsu or Singil-dong spicy jjamppong before?
You'll be fine because they are 4 times spicier than the crazy mandu

Oh, for real?
Don't even listen to this guy He never tried it before
Oh come on, you can't tell her that
Here is your mandu~ Wow, look how big this steamer is
Eat the crazy mandu at the end
Oh wow they don't look spicy at all The ones in front of it looks much more spicy
You won't be able to taste anything if you eat the crazy mandu first
Not spicy, spicy, not spicy, spicy, respectively
I got it! Thank you so much
I'll start with the regular mandu
It's non-spicy one
Dip it in soy sauce
It's.....
That little....
(What??) (restroom)
I am sorry. I'll teach him a lesson

No please don't
A fried mandu
It looks cute
I like the spicy one better
It is spicy
The spicy mandu is really tasty
A long awaited crazy mandu
(Oh no)
I'm ready
[we wish you the best]
Mann... I gotta go somewhere real quick
Just wait here
Plum juice! Plum juice! Plum juice!
Thank you
Thank you so much for real
This is my favorite

Thank you again
Piece of cake
This is nothing!
[Why are you crying?]
This is easyy
It's not as bad as I thought
[My eyes are sweating]
So there are different types of spicy flavors They vary in pungency
There is a delicious spicy that you can handle and there is one that just burns your mouth
I personally like Thai spicy foods
This tastes more like a spicy red pepper
You can't compare this with Yupdduk and Buldak ramen
Yupdduck and Buldak get hotter as you enjoy them, but this burns your mouth in 20 sec, actually 10 sec
Thanks for this again!
This is the hottest food I've ever had
I can't handle it

It's delicious
(non-spicy fried mandu)
Did you get the crazy mandu as well?
Yep
You did? I had 2 already
You ate 2???
(One more)
Wow
He ate the whole thing at a gulp
Isn't it hot
Is that a question?
Do you want some milk?
Huh? Do you want some milk?
What? Do you want some milk?
(He mumbles)
Do you want some milk?! Oh no no thank tho

Wait, PDnim (means producer), PDnim, PDnim Try one of this
I'll film it for you
Just one and that's it
I can't be the only one!
So far I'm ok
You sure?
Is it really not spicy? Just give it a min
I mean.. It is but....
Can you eat 10 of 'em? I'll do it for $1,000
LOL he says $1,000
You said it's not spicy!
Oh no, I just like milk!
Not because it's hot
It was about time
Let's take a thumbnail
(I wish it to be more realistic)

Let's take it when you actually start crying
Th.. That.. That's pretty tough
Are you being serious lol? I'll be shaking my hands at that point
I'll save this for later to take a thumbnail
Is it time to eat another spicy one
I'm scared
After you eat another one, let's do rock paper scissors with me to eat the rest 2
Rock paper scissors?
Do you even know that you are sweating so much?
(Shaking)
Am I really scared of a mandu right now?
I got this!
(Teary eyes)
It's not that bad (mumbling)
[Not a freeze frame]
If we take the thumbnail right now, I think it's guaranteed 300 million subscribers!!!!

You know, you can't even make a facial expression if your mouth is burning
Rock, Paper, Scissors!
[Finishing up non-spicy ones]
I can't even think straight
[Crazy mandu is waiting for you]
I have to eat at least 1 of them because I lost rock, paper, scissors
I actually am scared of it
You!
Scaryyy
This is not even a big deal normally
[Finished one]
[Who's next]
Rock, Paper, Scissors!
[Completely defeated]
It's alright, this is nothing
Just a piece of mandu

So when I first started this restaurants,
customers kept asking to make it spicier
and that's how it started
As I kept going, the very last customer said "This is freaking 'crazy'"
And that's how I named it
